textPlain: The shitcoin wave hits! It really is a pattern. I knew it the moment I saw the word “whitepaper”. It’s just like before. Always whitepaper.

The website (coralprotocol.org) is stunningly designed, but makes no reference to anyone who is actually using this. I also think the numerous references to a crypto token that is tied into this project severely undermine any research credibility.
There's an Ethereum ERC that sounds like almost the same thing: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004
I really don't understand why crypto is involved in this to begin with. I can't imagine any serious person wanting to tie their inference costs to a token price.

The roadmap is revealing. Before any actual product-related work they have these three bullet points:  - Rebrand from Ai23T → Coral Protocol
  - New Token live on Solana
  - Major exchange listings

It’s all about pumping another token that’s a rebrand from a previous one.What happened to “Ai23T”? Did it ship anything? Who cares! There’s a new token to list on exchanges and a new wave of hope and dreams.These things are no different from penny stocks of 1980s except that they’re promoted globally rather than by boiler room scam callers.
